select  
    execution_t.id, execution_name, execution_t.project_id, runner_name, execution_t.executor, parent_id, execute_status,
    CASE
    WHEN start_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE start_time
    END AS start_time,
    CASE
    WHEN complete_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE complete_time
    END AS complete_time,
    elapsed_time, "command_line", dryrun_command, normalrun_command, pre_dryrun_command, pre_normalrun_command,total, pass,
    fail, "skip", log_url, report_url, output_url, execution_t.created_at, execution_t.created_by,
    trigger, triggered_by, triggered_by_type,
    (
      CASE 
        WHEN execution_t.parent_id is null or execution_t.triggered_by_type = 'user' THEN
          CASE 
            WHEN NOT EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree
            ) THEN 'none'
            WHEN EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id, execute_status from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id, e.execute_status from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree where execute_status not in ('COMPLETED', 'ABORTED')
            ) THEN 'pending'
            ELSE 'complete'
          END
        ELSE 'none'
      END
    ) as rerun_status,
    (
      with recursive execution_tree as (
        select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
        union all
        select e.id from execution_t e
        join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
        where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
      )
      select count(*) from execution_tree
    ) as child_count,
    order_id, order_name, data_source, runtime_error, auto_delete, collect_robot_log,
    is_remote, enable_dryrun, execute_order, execution_t.project_checksum, retry, current_retry_count, rerun_failed, merge_result, merge_status, merge_command, merged_log_url, merged_report_url, merged_output_url, merge_runtime_error, merge_start_time, merge_complete_time, merge_elapsed_time
     
    ,etpt.time_points
    from execution_t
    left join order_t on execution_t.order_id = order_t.id

    SELECT
    execution_id,
    coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('timestamp', "timestamp" , 'executeStatus', execute_status)), '[]'::jsonb) as time_points

    execution_time_point_t
    GROUP BY
    execution_id
    ) etpt on execution_t.id = etpt.execution_id
   
     
     WHERE  execute_status in

select
            n.id,
            n.message,
            n.severity,
            n.active,
            n.expires_at,
            n.updated_at,
            n.created_at
        from
            notification_t n
        left join
            dismissed_notifications_t d on n.id = d.notification_id and d.user_id = ?
        where
            (n.expires_at > NOW() OR n.expires_at IS NULL)
            and n.active = true  -- Ensure only active notifications are considered
            and (n.severity = 'critical' or (n.severity != 'critical' and d.id is null))
        order by
            n.created_at asc

        order by

WITH latest_resources AS (
          SELECT
              runner_id,
              cpu_usage,
              disk_usage,
              mem_usage,
              ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY runner_id ORDER BY timestamp DESC) AS row_num
          FROM
              runner_resource_t
      ), threshold_check AS (
          SELECT
              r.id AS runnerId,
              r.name AS runnerName,
              r.overloaded,
              CASE
                  WHEN r.status != 'ACTIVE' THEN false
                  WHEN r.overloaded = false AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage > r.cpu_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage > r.disk_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage > r.mem_usage_limit)
                  ) THEN true
                  WHEN r.overloaded = true AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage < r.cpu_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage < r.disk_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage < r.mem_usage_limit * 0.95)
                  ) THEN false
                  ELSE r.overloaded
              END AS shouldBeOverloaded,
              lr.cpu_usage AS currentCpu,
              r.cpu_usage_limit AS limitCpu,
              lr.disk_usage AS currentDisk,
              r.disk_usage_limit AS limitDisk,
              lr.mem_usage AS currentMemory,
              r.mem_usage_limit AS limitMemory
          FROM
              runner_t r
          LEFT JOIN latest_resources lr ON r.id = lr.runner_id AND lr.row_num = 1
          WHERE
              r.status = 'ACTIVE' OR r.overloaded = true
      )
      SELECT * FROM threshold_check;

            n.expires_at,
            n.updated_at,
            n.created_at

select  
    execution_t.id, execution_name, execution_t.project_id, runner_name, execution_t.executor, parent_id, execute_status,
    CASE
    WHEN start_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE start_time
    END AS start_time,
    CASE
    WHEN complete_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE complete_time
    END AS complete_time,
    elapsed_time, "command_line", dryrun_command, normalrun_command, pre_dryrun_command, pre_normalrun_command,total, pass,
    fail, "skip", log_url, report_url, output_url, execution_t.created_at, execution_t.created_by,
    trigger, triggered_by, triggered_by_type,
    (
      CASE 
        WHEN execution_t.parent_id is null or execution_t.triggered_by_type = 'user' THEN
          CASE 
            WHEN NOT EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree
            ) THEN 'none'
            WHEN EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id, execute_status from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id, e.execute_status from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree where execute_status not in ('COMPLETED', 'ABORTED')
            ) THEN 'pending'
            ELSE 'complete'
          END
        ELSE 'none'
      END
    ) as rerun_status,
    (
      with recursive execution_tree as (
        select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
        union all
        select e.id from execution_t e
        join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
        where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
      )
      select count(*) from execution_tree
    ) as child_count,
    order_id, order_name, data_source, runtime_error, auto_delete, collect_robot_log,

    FROM
    execution_time_point_t
    GROUP BY
    execution_id
    ) etpt on execution_t.id = etpt.execution_id

WITH latest_resources AS (
          SELECT
              runner_id,
              cpu_usage,
              disk_usage,
              mem_usage,
              ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY runner_id ORDER BY timestamp DESC) AS row_num
          FROM
              runner_resource_t
      ), threshold_check AS (
          SELECT
              r.id AS runnerId,
              r.name AS runnerName,
              r.overloaded,
              CASE
                  WHEN r.status != 'ACTIVE' THEN false
                  WHEN r.overloaded = false AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage > r.cpu_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage > r.disk_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage > r.mem_usage_limit)
                  ) THEN true
                  WHEN r.overloaded = true AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage < r.cpu_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage < r.disk_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage < r.mem_usage_limit * 0.95)
                  ) THEN false
                  ELSE r.overloaded
              END AS shouldBeOverloaded,
              lr.cpu_usage AS currentCpu,
              r.cpu_usage_limit AS limitCpu,
              lr.disk_usage AS currentDisk,
              r.disk_usage_limit AS limitDisk,
              lr.mem_usage AS currentMemory,
              r.mem_usage_limit AS limitMemory
          FROM
              runner_t r
          LEFT JOIN latest_resources lr ON r.id = lr.runner_id AND lr.row_num = 1
          WHERE
              r.status = 'ACTIVE' OR r.overloaded = true
      )
      SELECT * FROM threshold_check;

            n.id,
            n.message,
            n.severity,
            n.active,
            n.expires_at,
            n.updated_at,
            n.created_at
        from
            notification_t n
        left join
            dismissed_notifications_t d on n.id = d.notification_id and d.user_id = ?

            (n.expires_at > NOW() OR n.expires_at IS NULL)

            and (n.severity = 'critical' or (n.severity != 'critical' and d.id is null))
        order by

select  
    execution_t.id, execution_name, execution_t.project_id, runner_name, execution_t.executor, parent_id, execute_status,
    CASE
    WHEN start_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE start_time
    END AS start_time,
    CASE
    WHEN complete_time = '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z' THEN NULL
    ELSE complete_time
    END AS complete_time,
    elapsed_time, "command_line", dryrun_command, normalrun_command, pre_dryrun_command, pre_normalrun_command,total, pass,
    fail, "skip", log_url, report_url, output_url, execution_t.created_at, execution_t.created_by,
    trigger, triggered_by, triggered_by_type,
    (
      CASE 
        WHEN execution_t.parent_id is null or execution_t.triggered_by_type = 'user' THEN
          CASE 
            WHEN NOT EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree
            ) THEN 'none'
            WHEN EXISTS (
              with recursive execution_tree as (
                select id, execute_status from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
                union all
                select e.id, e.execute_status from execution_t e
                join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
                where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
              )
              select 1 from execution_tree where execute_status not in ('COMPLETED', 'ABORTED')
            ) THEN 'pending'
            ELSE 'complete'
          END
        ELSE 'none'
      END
    ) as rerun_status,
    (
      with recursive execution_tree as (
        select id from execution_t et where et.parent_id = execution_t.id and et.triggered_by_type != 'user'
        union all
        select e.id from execution_t e
        join execution_tree tree on e.parent_id = tree.id
        where e.triggered_by_type != 'user'
      )
      select count(*) from execution_tree
    ) as child_count,
    order_id, order_name, data_source, runtime_error, auto_delete, collect_robot_log,
    is_remote, enable_dryrun, execute_order, execution_t.project_checksum, retry, current_retry_count, rerun_failed, merge_result, merge_status, merge_command, merged_log_url, merged_report_url, merged_output_url, merge_runtime_error, merge_start_time, merge_complete_time, merge_elapsed_time
     
    ,etpt.time_points
    from execution_t
    left join order_t on execution_t.order_id = order_t.id
     
    left join (
    SELECT
    execution_id,
    coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('timestamp', "timestamp" , 'executeStatus', execute_status)), '[]'::jsonb) as time_points
    FROM
    execution_time_point_t
    GROUP BY
    execution_id
    ) etpt on execution_t.id = etpt.execution_id
   
     
     WHERE  execute_status in
        (
          ?
        ,
          ?
        ,
          ?
        ,
          ?
        ) 
   
     
     
       
        ORDER BY start_time  desc  NULLS LAST
       
     
   
     
     
       
        LIMIT 10
         
       
     
   
    ; select count(*) as record_counts from execution_t
     
     WHERE  execute_status in
        (
          ?

        ,
          ?
        ,
          ?
        )

WITH latest_resources AS (
          SELECT
              runner_id,
              cpu_usage,
              disk_usage,
              mem_usage,
              ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY runner_id ORDER BY timestamp DESC) AS row_num
          FROM
              runner_resource_t
      ), threshold_check AS (
          SELECT
              r.id AS runnerId,
              r.name AS runnerName,
              r.overloaded,
              CASE
                  WHEN r.status != 'ACTIVE' THEN false
                  WHEN r.overloaded = false AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage > r.cpu_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage > r.disk_usage_limit) OR
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage > r.mem_usage_limit)
                  ) THEN true
                  WHEN r.overloaded = true AND (
                      (lr.cpu_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.cpu_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.cpu_usage < r.cpu_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.disk_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.disk_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.disk_usage < r.disk_usage_limit * 0.95) AND
                      (lr.mem_usage IS NOT NULL AND r.mem_usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND lr.mem_usage < r.mem_usage_limit * 0.95)
                  ) THEN false
                  ELSE r.overloaded
              END AS shouldBeOverloaded,
              lr.cpu_usage AS currentCpu,
              r.cpu_usage_limit AS limitCpu,
              lr.disk_usage AS currentDisk,
              r.disk_usage_limit AS limitDisk,
              lr.mem_usage AS currentMemory,
              r.mem_usage_limit AS limitMemory
          FROM
              runner_t r
          LEFT JOIN latest_resources lr ON r.id = lr.runner_id AND lr.row_num = 1
          WHERE
              r.status = 'ACTIVE' OR r.overloaded = true
      )
      SELECT * FROM threshold_check;
